overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The player moves from a narrow industrial alley with parked police cars, through covered walkways under elevated highways, and up a curved staircase into an elevated lounge bar with panoramic city views and vibrant neon lighting.

events.description: NPC dialogue appears on screen - Ashley tells player to move along
exits narrow alley into wider street area under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow industrial alley past parked NCPD police cars

notable_agents.action: parked NCPD police car with glowing blue markings blocking part of the alley

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall with industrial metal panels and piping
metal walkways and pipes connecting buildings overhead
yellow diagonal warning stripes painted on the ground

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow industrial alleyway with dark concrete walls and overhead metal structures. An NCPD police car is parked ahead, and dialogue from an NPC named Ashley appears telling the player to move along. The environment is dimly lit with greenish industrial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: approaches and begins ascending large curved staircase structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange-paved sidewalk toward a large curved staircase

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the stairs

entered.detail: distinctive orange-red paved pedestrian path with geometric patterns
metal railings along the right edge of the walkway
large curved staircase with neon lighting leading upward to elevated level
large illuminated advertisement screen showing food items

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the player enters a wider covered walkway with distinctive orange paving and metal railings. The area is under an elevated highway structure. Ahead, a large curved staircase with neon accents leads upward, while digital billboards glow in the distance. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending staircase to elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters elevated lounge area with curved glass roof

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved concrete staircase toward the upper level lounge area

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: futuristic curved glass and metal canopy structure with neon edge lighting
dark wooden plank flooring of the elevated walkway
colorful neon light strips in green and pink along the structure

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the wide curved staircase, transitioning from the street level to an elevated area. At the top, the scene opens into a futuristic lounge space enclosed by a curved glass canopy with vibrant neon lighting. The flooring changes to dark wood, and the city skyline becomes visible through the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor lounge bar with panoramic city views

events.description: passes by the bar counter area with illuminated stools and bottle display

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated lounge, observing the neon-lit interior and city views through the glass walls

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter arranging items
group of people sitting in curved booth seating around illuminated tables

entered.detail: curved booth seating with purple illuminated tables and comfortable seating
long bar with teal stools and illuminated backlit bottle display
large holographic advertisements and billboards visible through the glass walls

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the elevated lounge bar, a semi-enclosed space with a curved glass roof offering views of the neon-lit city. Groups of people sit in curved booths with glowing purple tables. The player passes a bar counter with teal stools and continues along the wooden walkway as holographic advertisements glow through the glass walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim industrial alleyway into a vibrant, elevated neon lounge overlooking the city. It begins by moving through a narrow concrete corridor under metal structures and greenish lighting, passing a parked NCPD police car. As the camera exits the alley, the environment opens into a wider covered walkway with orange paving beneath an elevated highway, where digital billboards glow in the distance. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends a wide curved staircase, transitioning from the street level into a futuristic lounge enclosed by a curved glass canopy and dark wooden flooring. Finally, the movement continues through the semi-enclosed bar, passing glowing purple booths and teal stools while the neon-lit city skyline and holographic advertisements become visible through the glass walls.
